text:
LABEL: Acute Inpatient Hospital Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of Medicare coinsurance and deductible payments in the acute inpatient 
hospital setting for the year. The total acute hospitalization beneficiary payments are calculated as the 
sum of the beneficiary deductible amount and coinsurance amount (variables called 
NCH_BENE_IP_DDCTBL_AMT and NCH_BENE_PTA_COINSRNC_LBLTY_AM) for all acute inpatient claims 
where the CLM_PMT_AMT >= 0. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG
